sentences.arabic: حَجَزْتُ غُرْفَةً مُنْفَرِدَةً فِي فُنْدُقٍ قَرِيبٍ مِنَ الْمَرْكَزِ.
sentences.translation: Rezervisao sam jednokrevetnu sobu u hotelu blizu centra.
sentences.translationEn: I booked a single room in a hotel near the center.

sentences.arabic: سَأَلْتُ الْمُوَظَّفَ عَنْ مَوْعِدِ تَنَاوُلِ الْفُطُورِ.
sentences.translation: Pitao sam službenika o vremenu doručka.
sentences.translationEn: I asked the staff member about the breakfast time.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ لِي إِنَّ الْفُطُورَ يَبْدَأُ مِنَ السَّاعَةِ السَّابِعَةِ صَبَاحًا.
sentences.translation: Rekao mi je da doručak počinje od sedam sati ujutro.
sentences.translationEn: He told me that breakfast starts at seven in the morning.

sentences.arabic: كَمَا سَأَلْتُ عَنْ كَلِمَةِ السِّرِّ لِشَبَكَةِ الْإِنْتِرْنِتِ.
sentences.translation: Takođe sam pitao za lozinku za internet mrežu.
sentences.translationEn: I also asked for the Wi-Fi password.

sentences.arabic: الْغُرْفَةُ نَظِيفَةٌ وَتُطِلُّ عَلَى شَارِعٍ هَادِئٍ.
sentences.translation: Soba je čista i gleda na mirnu ulicu.
sentences.translationEn: The room is clean and overlooks a quiet street.
